Wait, maybe ACTION7 requires a different format. Let me check if there's a way to use it.
Actually, looking at the error message, it says "Unknown action at index 1: 'ACTION7'". This suggests that the action name 'ACTION7' is not recognized. Maybe ACTION7 is a placeholder for some other action that I need to discover.
Let me focus on the game state. The white bar is at 8 pixels, which means I'm running out of time. Let me try to move the magenta dots to touch the blue shape and see if something happens.

Actually, I don't have access to the very first frame of the level. Let me just try to move the dots to form a pattern.
Wait, I just realized something. The white bar is at 8 pixels, but the level hasn't ended. Maybe the white bar is not a timer but something else. Let me check if the white bar changes when I don't take any actions.
Actually, I can't wait without taking actions. Let me just try to move the dots to touch the blue shape.
The blue shape is centered around (27, 33) with boundary [[23, 31], [23, 35], [25, 37], [29, 37], [31, 35], [31, 31], [29, 29], [25, 29]]. The leftmost point is at column 29.
The magenta dot at (25, 23) has cells (25,23), (25,24), (26,23), (26,24). To move it right, I would need a right movement, but I haven't found one yet.
Wait, let me reconsider the movement rules. Maybe I need to click on cells outside the dot to move it in different directions. Or maybe the movement depends on the dot's position relative to the blue shape.
Actually, let me try clicking on the blue shape itself to see if something happens.
